openQuestions.question: Q1: Parity Ledger has no row for Workspace Home — confirm cockpit.js (+home.js) replaces it and add the ledger row pre-build.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Add 'Workspace Home → Cockpit (+ Today)' ledger row with per-function statuses before any build PR.

openQuestions.question: Q2: Meeting Brief home — keep as Cockpit tab, move to Insights Engine, or retire?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: T1 carry-over: keep MeetingBriefPage as a secondary Cockpit tab unchanged (additive-parity insurance); redesign later.

openQuestions.question: Q3: work-order fulfillment (conversation/complete/close-out) home — Inbox, Pipeline, or keep modal?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep WorkOrderPanel modal launchable from a Cockpit queue row (zero server work; API intact).

openQuestions.question: Q4: is Cockpit intentionally number-free, or does it carry a compact KPI strip? Traffic Value/ROI has no per-client home at all.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Compact KPI strip reusing existing WorkspaceHomeData fields incl. traffic value — de-risks an unratified behavior change.

openQuestions.question: Q5: where do churn-signal detail rows live in the new IA?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Render churn signals as work-queue rows in the unclassified/risk bucket; health chip alone is insufficient.

openQuestions.question: Q6: composite 0-100 client-signals health score → qualitative 'On track/At risk' chip is a status-meaning change.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep the number (chip label derived FROM the score, score shown on hover/detail).

openQuestions.question: Q7: Activity feed + Weekly accomplishments have no prototype home.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep WeeklyAccomplishments strip under the verdict; mount ActivityFeed in a Drawer from the toolbar.

openQuestions.question: Q8: freshness indicator + manual refresh — system-wide Build Conventions pattern or per-surface?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Promote to a system-wide shell/toolbar convention; decide once, apply to all rebuilt surfaces.

openQuestions.question: Q9: sign-off on net-new P1-P6 (verdict, monetization stream, provenance chips, promote-to-signal, graduation, switcher roll-up).
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Adopt P1 (server template) + P3 (real field); defer P2/P4/P5/P6 to C3-style individually-flagged follow-ups.

openQuestions.question: Q10: confirm Action Results carries SeoChangeImpact's change-level before/after GSC measurement.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: If unconfirmed by the outcomes surface discovery, carry SeoChangeImpact into Cockpit's queue detail as T1.

openQuestions.question: Q11: confirm briefing review workflow (approve/publish/skip-note/generate-now) lands on the Recommendations surface.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: If not, mount BriefingReviewQueue behind its existing client-briefing-v2 flag inside Cockpit's send stream.

openQuestions.question: Newly-found: keyboard shortcut scheme (⌘1/2/3) has no home in the prototype or Build Conventions.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Preserve ⌘1→Cockpit wiring in the rebuilt shell; defining a full scheme is a shell-level (F4/engine) decision.

openQuestions.question: Newly-found: Content Velocity card (row 30) is at_risk with no doc open question and no prototype home.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Include velocity in the Q4 KPI strip (data already on the payload); otherwise DEF-* ledger row.

New cross-surface endpoint + workflow (sn-cockpit-4) with no HEAD equivalent; needs its own flag + sign-off.

verdicts.evidence: No per-client daily verdict/status generator exists — rg 'verdict' server/ hits only the ROI outcomeVerdict (server/the-issue-export.ts:63-108, shared/types/roi.ts:57) which is money-ratio outcome value, NOT a status+narrative home verdict. No 'narrative'/composeVerdict/homeStatus generator found (rg across server/ shared/ = 0). weeklySummary inputs confirmed present at server/routes/workspace-home.ts:83-96 (recentActivity → seoUpdates/auditsRun/contentGenerated/contentPublished/requestsResolved) and attention counts are assembled client-side. Template-composed-first, upgradeable-to-callAI is sound; effort M is fair.

Attention items are assembled client-side: src/components/WorkspaceHome.tsx builds `const attentionItems: AttentionItem[] = []` then ~10 `attentionItems.push({...})` calls (new requests, work orders, decay, pending content, audit errors, rank drops, review cells, setup gaps) sorted by severityOrder. server/routes/workspace-home.ts:31-125 returns raw arrays (ranks/requests/contentRequests/workOrders/contentPipeline/…) with NO stream/queue/opt/send/money classification — rg 'stream|workQueue|unclassified' server/routes/workspace-home.ts server/domains/ = 0. Effort L is defensible given counts must match destination screens.

Direction CONFIRMED but the cited line references are wrong. OutcomeProvenance (the estimate/measured/actual ladder) is defined at shared/types/outcome-tracking.ts:139-145 — NOT :293. Line 293 is `OutcomeCoverageProvenance` (a DISTINCT admin-only PERSISTED per-row column; the type doc at :147-160 explicitly warns 'do not import one where the other is expected'). The roi.ts field-use is at shared/types/roi.ts:71 `provenance: OutcomeProvenance` inside outcomeVerdict (roi.ts:52 is the wrong anchor — that's the priorPeriodCount comment block). Absent-from-WorkspaceHomeData is correct (src/api/platform.ts:68-90 has no provenance). Effort S is CORRECT and worth affirming: OutcomeProvenance is 'computed-at-read-time … never persisted' (outcome-tracking.ts:151-152), so this is pure serialization — NO migration, NO row-mapper/DB-column lockstep. Use OutcomeProvenance, never OutcomeCoverageProvenance.
verdicts.correction: Serialize OutcomeProvenance (shared/types/outcome-tracking.ts:139, exposed on roi.ts:71 outcomeVerdict.provenance) onto cockpit money rows. Do NOT confuse with the persisted admin-only OutcomeCoverageProvenance at outcome-tracking.ts:293. Effort S stands (read-time value, no migration).

verdicts.evidence: server/routes/insights.ts defines exactly two routes: router.get('/api/insights/:workspaceId/queue', :15) and router.put(..., :27, resolve). No other /api/insights route exists anywhere (rg "router.(get|post|...)('/api/insights" server/ = only insights.ts:15). rg 'promote_to_signal|promoteToSignal' across src/ server/ shared/ = 0 hits; all 'promote' hits are unrelated (keyword-set/local-seo/briefing-cron). A 'promote to signal' POST with activity log + broadcast does not exist. Effort M is fair.

Upsell exists ONLY as client purchase flows, no admin pitch queue. shared/types/recommendations.ts:35 `productType?: string // for purchasable fix upsell` (+ productPrice) is a client purchase field on a rec. server/briefing-candidates.ts:210 comment confirms content-gap candidates 'drive the "Recommended for You" section and one of the highest-margin upsell flows … (per-brief content generation pricing)' — a client-facing flow, not an admin monetization queue. rg 'upsell|monetization|pitch|scope.expansion' server/ surfaces only client purchase/sales-report/pricing code; no per-client admin upsell-play queue. partial + effort M are accurate.

GET /api/workspace-overview exists at server/routes/workspaces.ts:108 (surfaced via src/api/platform.ts workspaceOverview.list, '/api/workspace-overview'). Its per-workspace return object (workspaces.ts:247-296) already carries the raw signals needed: requests {total,new,active} (open-requests), churnSignals {critical,warning} (at-risk proxy), and hasGsc/hasGa4/hasPassword/tier/isTrial (in-setup proxies). No literal at-risk/in-setup FIELDS (rg 'atRisk|inSetup|lifecycleStatus' = 0), confirming 'not confirmed on it' — but the aggregation is the right place to derive them. 'Extend the existing all-workspace aggregation rather than a new endpoint' is correct; effort S is fair (derivation over existing per-ws map).
